items.title: Bitcoin ETFs add $368M in three-day buying streak
items.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs attracted $79.2 million on Thursday, lifting their three-day inflow total to about $368 million as Bitcoin attempted a price recovery.

items.title: Ordinals advocate Leonidas proposes new Bitcoin client: ‘$DOG Mode’
items.summary: “Over time the economic incentives will drive $DOG Mode’s adoption and force Bitcoin Core to stop gatekeeping and allow these completely valid transactions,” said Leonidas.

items.title: Bitcoin’s anti-spam fight gets a 'DOG Mode' reply
items.summary: While BIP 110 wants to restrict data through a consensus change and has almost no miner support, a new DOG Mode client wants the opposite and requires no vote at all.

items.title: Crypto exchange Bybit launches in Indonesia after NOBI acquisition
items.summary: The launch gives Bybit a locally operated platform in one of Asia’s largest crypto markets, home to more than 21 million crypto exchange users.
